perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young boys are seen at a wooden table, enthusiastically counting large stacks of New Taiwan Dollar bills (1000 and 100 denominations). Several red envelopes are scattered on the table. (2) The boys organize the cash and carefully place it into the red envelopes. They share smiles and looks of excitement. (3) The scene shifts to the boys leaving; one boy carries the other on his back inside an elevator, both wearing helmets and jackets. (4) They arrive at a bank's ATM area. The older boy inserts the cash into the machine while the younger one watches intently. (5) After the deposit, they check a bank book and pose happily with a woman for the camera, showing a peace sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo Japanese-style pop music begins immediately and remains consistent throughout the video. (2) No clear human speech or vocals are heard from the main characters over the music. (3) Faint ambient sounds of the bank and ATM mechanical movements are audible in the background but are largely masked by the BGM. (4) The music reaches a final upbeat crescendo as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional/Hook Text: "POV：回台北第一件事。馬上存紅包" (POV: First thing returning to Taipei. Immediately deposit red envelopes). This text remains on screen throughout the video with an enthusiastic tone. (2) Decorative Text: Red envelopes on the table feature traditional Chinese characters for "Great Fortune and Great Profit."

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (counting money at home) -> Transition (going to the bank) -> Conclusion (completing the deposit).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main children characters, 1 adult female accompanying them, and at least 1 passer-by/staff member visible at the bank.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young boys; one wearing a quilted jacket and glasses, the other in a yellow puffer vest and striped pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home setting with a wooden table and a TV in the background, followed by a modern bank interior with a Hitachi ATM machine and bank service counters.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Winter (based on thick jackets and red envelopes)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents two children in Taipei performing their first 'official' task after returning to the city: depositing their Lunar New Year red envelope money into a bank account. By combining scenes of counting cash with the actual bank visit, the video aims to showcase a wholesome family moment that blends financial education with the joy of childhood tradition, all set to an energetic soundtrack to maintain a cheerful mood.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced montage editing synchronized with a high-BPM Japanese pop track.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses New Taiwan Dollars (TWD) and local banking infrastructure, firmly rooting the context in Taiwan.
